backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a student experience-sharing platform with posts (categorized, upvotable), wishlists (session-based), college connect tips, and blob storage via MixinStorage. Exposes CRUD and query functions for posts, stats, wishlists, and college connects.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented UI/palette features (removing black colors, redesigning to warm brown/sky-blue palette) to their affected source files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each file's purpose, key hooks/props used, and palette/styling approach.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark modes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with a Telugu-script page title and a root div mounting the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with six routes (Home, Share, PostDetail, Dashboard, About, Wishlist) wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, with a simple AppShell layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectFo: A React form component for submitting college tips with fields for college name, year, and tip text, including validation, warm OKLCH inline styling, and success feedback via playBubblePop.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectLi: Displays a scrollable list of college connect tips fetched via a query hook, showing college name, year badge (color-coded), relative timestamp, and tip text, with loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with brand name, desktop/mobile navigation links, mute toggle for sounds, and a SparkParticles background, wrapping page content.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a single post showing category badge, year badge, bookmark toggle (wishlist), and relative timestamp, linking to the post detail page.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Provides share action buttons for a post including WhatsApp share, copy link to clipboard, and native Web Share API, each styled as rounded pill buttons.
frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.t: Renders 16 animated floating pill particles across a stratified 4×4 grid layout in the background, each displaying a college year label with warm color schemes.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen onboarding modal that prompts the user to select their college year and optionally enter their college name, persisting the selection via the useYearSelection hook.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing English/Telugu language toggling with sessionStorage persistence and a translation lookup function `t` for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality via AuthClient, exposing identity state and status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching posts, stats, wishlist management, and college connects, using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Manages per-session wishlist state using a UUID stored in sessionStorage, exposing toggle, saved status, and loading state for a given post ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Persists and retrieves a student's college year and college name selections from sessionStorage, providing getters and setters for both values.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles including Tailwind imports, a warm brown/skin-tone CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes, and custom animations like dot-grid backgrounds and spark-float keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero banner, mission statement, feature grid, and College Connect section describing the platform's purpose and key differentiators.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Displays a stats dashboard with total post counts by category, top upvoted posts, and a college connect section using data from the useGetStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main feed page with a hero banner, category filter tabs, and a responsive grid of PostCards fetched via useGetAllPosts or useGetPostsByCategory.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Shows a single post's full detail view with category badge, author year, bookmark toggle, and share buttons, looked up by ID from the full posts list.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Provides a form for students to submit a new experience post with category selection, character-limited content, and a year selection modal gate.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: Displays the user's bookmarked posts by cross-referencing wishlist IDs from the session with all posts, showing a grid of saved PostCards or an empty state.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for the entire app, covering navigation, categories, page copy, form labels, and UI messages.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides utility functions for playing Web Audio API sound effects (bubble pop and typing tick) with mute state persisted in sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, and spark-float keyframe animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks overall project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features for the college feedback-sharing platform.
